assessor_1_raw: Card fraud detection: 90-day label completeness exclusion is standard practice. Threshold calibration on validation and applied to test is correct. Design is sound. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Temporal split prevents label leakage. Both models share identical data windows. Threshold-sensitive metric (precision at 1% FPR) correctly reflects operational budget constraint. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Sequence model receives raw transaction history; GBT receives aggregated statistics. Both feature sets use only transaction-time information. No post-transaction signals. Verdict: defense_wins.
